basic_details.job_title: EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Guest Teacher, Staff Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Eklavya Model Residential School Sukhrapara (EMRS Sukhrapara)
basic_details.short_information: Eklavya Model Residential School Sukhrapara (EMRS Sukhrapara) has officially announced the Guest Teacher and Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The recruitment notification has been released for eligible candidates with qualifications including Post Graduate Degree with B.Ed. for PGT, Graduate Degree with B.Ed. and CTET/STET for TGT, and B.Sc. Nursing for Staff Nurse posts. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 21 to 40 years for PGT, 21 to 35 years for TGT, and maximum 35 years for Staff Nurse can submit their applications through offline mode on or before 21 July 2026. Direct l

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: PGT: 21-40 years, TGT: 21-35 years, Staff Nurse: Max 35 years.
age_limit.details: PGT: Minimum age 21 years, Maximum age 40 years. TGT: Minimum age 21 years, Maximum age 35 years. Staff Nurse: Maximum age 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: PGT: Post Graduate Degree with B.Ed. TGT: Graduate Degree with B.Ed. and CTET/STET. Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing.
qualification.details: Guest Teacher Post Graduate Teacher (PGT): Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject with B.Ed. Guest Teacher Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT): Graduate Degree in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET/STET qualified. Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing (Hons.) or B.Sc. Nursing or Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with registration in State Nursing Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EMRS Sukhrapara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jashpur.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Sukhrapara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download EMRS Sukhrapara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EMRS Sukhrapara Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Guest Teacher Post Graduate Teacher (PGT): Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject with B.Ed. Guest Teacher Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT): Graduate Degree in the concerned subject with B.Ed. and CTET/STET qualified. Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing (Hons.) or B.Sc. Nursing or Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with registration in State Nursing Council.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Sukhrapara Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Sukhrapara Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: PGT: Minimum age 21 years, Maximum age 40 years. TGT: Minimum age 21 years, Maximum age 35 years. Staff Nurse: Maximum age 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit list based on academic qualification marks and walk-in-interview marks.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for EMRS Sukhrapara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://jashpur.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 is 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies available for Guest Teacher and Staff Nurse posts in Eklavya Model Residential School Sukhrapara for the academic session 2026-27.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in the concerned subject along with a B.Ed. degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is CTET/STET qualification mandatory for TGT posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for TGT posts must have a Graduate Degree in the concerned subject, B.Ed., and must have qualified the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) Paper-II or State Teacher Eligibility Test (STET) Paper-II.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for TGT posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT) posts is between 21 to 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration for the Staff Nurse position is ₹35,400/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via registered post or by hand.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to Eklavya Model Residential School, Sukhrapara, District- Jashpur (C.G.) 496118.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from academic qualification marks and marks obtained in the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. When will the walk-in interviews be conducted?
faq.answer: Walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates in July 2026, starting from 23rd July 2026, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for EMRS Sukhrapara Recruitment 2026 is 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.
